title: How to get the text after the last delimiter (e.g. a file extension)
task: Return everything after the final separator, like the extension after the last dot.

google_sheets.note: Sheets: TEXTAFTER is not native; REGEXEXTRACT works.

explanation: TEXTAFTER(text, delimiter, -1) returns everything after the LAST occurrence of the delimiter. For 'report.final.xlsx' that is 'xlsx'. The negative instance number counts from the end.
